name: 03_rag_overload
description: Massive retrieval dominance with some overlapping segments.

chunks.content: A pandas DataFrame is a 2-dimensional labeled data structure with columns of potentially different types.
You can think of a DataFrame as a spreadsheet or SQL table.
It is generally the most commonly used pandas object.
DataFrame accepts many different kinds of input: Dict of 1D ndarrays, lists, dicts, or Series.
Data structure also contains labeled axes (rows and columns).
Arithmetic operations align on both row and column labels.
Can be thought of as a dict-like container for Series objects.
A pandas DataFrame is a 2-dimensional labeled data structure with columns.
You can think of a DataFrame as a spreadsheet.
